'''kogaraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eyebrowlike|eyebrowlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eyebrowlike|eyebrowlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kogaraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogarithi|kogarithi]] || [[word:kogariji|kogariji]] || [[word:kogarishi|kogarishi]] || [[word:kogariki|kogariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogaruthuthu|kogaruthuthu]] || [[word:kogarujuju|kogarujuju]] || [[word:kogarushushu|kogarushushu]] || [[word:kogarukuku|kogarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogaruthu|kogaruthu]] || [[word:kogaruju|kogaruju]] || [[word:kogarushu|kogarushu]] || [[word:kogaruku|kogaruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogarufthuf|kogarufthuf]] || [[word:kogarufjuf|kogarufjuf]] || [[word:kogarufshuf|kogarufshuf]] || [[word:kogarufkuf|kogarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogarethe|kogarethe]] || [[word:kogareje|kogareje]] || [[word:kogareshe|kogareshe]] || [[word:kogareke|kogareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogarothotho|kogarothotho]] || [[word:kogarojojo|kogarojojo]] || [[word:kogaroshosho|kogaroshosho]] || [[word:kogarokoko|kogarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogarotho|kogarotho]] || [[word:kogarojo|kogarojo]] || [[word:kogarosho|kogarosho]] || [[word:kogaroko|kogaroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogarofthof|kogarofthof]] || [[word:kogarofjof|kogarofjof]] || [[word:kogarofshof|kogarofshof]] || [[word:kogarofkof|kogarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfthÃŸf|kogarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfjÃŸf|kogarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfshÃŸf|kogarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfkÃŸf|kogarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kogarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kogarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kogarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kogarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfthÃŸf|kogarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfjÃŸf|kogarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfshÃŸf|kogarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfkÃŸf|kogarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfthÃŸf|kogarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfjÃŸf|kogarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfshÃŸf|kogarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kogarÃŸfkÃŸf|kogarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kogarÃḊthÃḊ|kogarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kogarÃḊjÃḊ|kogarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kogarÃḊshÃḊ|kogarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kogarÃḊkÃḊ|kogarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kogarathatha|kogarathatha]] || [[word:kogarajaja|kogarajaja]] || [[word:kogarashasha|kogarashasha]] || [[word:kogarakaka|kogarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kogaratha|kogaratha]] || [[word:kogaraja|kogaraja]] || [[word:kogarasha|kogarasha]] || [[word:kogaraka|kogaraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kogarafthaf|kogarafthaf]] || [[word:kogarafjaf|kogarafjaf]] || [[word:kogarafshaf|kogarafshaf]] || [[word:kogarafkaf|kogarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kogarasha|kogarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogarshÃḋsha|kogarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogarosha|kogarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogarmusha|kogarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogaryasha|kogaryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogarnkshÃḋsha|gokogarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogarnkrosha|gokogarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogarnkmusha|gokogarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogarnkyasha|gokogarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kogagarasha|kogagarasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogagarshÃḋsha|kogagarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogagarosha|kogagarosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogagarmusha|kogagarmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogagaryasha|kogagaryasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogagarnkshÃḋsha|gokogagarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogagarnkrosha|gokogagarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogagarnkmusha|gokogagarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogagarnkyasha|gokogagarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kegÃḊrasha|kegÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kegÃḊrshÃḋsha|kegÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kegÃḊrosha|kegÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kegÃḊrmusha|kegÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kegÃḊryasha|kegÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokegÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gokegÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokegÃḊrnkrosha|gokegÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokegÃḊrnkmusha|gokegÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokegÃḊrnkyasha|gokegÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kogfarasha|kogfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kogfarshÃḋsha|kogfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kogfarosha|kogfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kogfarmusha|kogfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kogfaryasha|kogfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokogfarnkshÃḋsha|gokogfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokogfarnkrosha|gokogfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokogfarnkmusha|gokogfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokogfarnkyasha|gokogfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
